text.title: Vendor Evaluation Scorecard for AI Tooling Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end with explicit decision-gates.

step.name: define-weights
step.action: Set five weights summing to 1.0; record rationale per weight.
step.decision-gate: Re-open if any weight changes after scoring starts.

step.name: collect-evidence
step.action: Per dimension, gather ≥2 evidence items (doc, benchmark, demo log) per vendor.

step.name: score-cells
step.action: Score 0-1 per cell with one-sentence justification linking evidence.

step.name: compute-exit-cost
step.action: For each vendor estimate exit_cost_eng_days (data export + re-index + integration rewire).

step.name: decide-and-publish
step.action: Compute weighted score; pick winner; publish scorecard + decision log.
